summary: An official White House video styled as an 'ASMR: Illegal Alien Deportation Flight,' presenting the sounds of a deportation operation (clinking chains, ratcheting handcuffs, footsteps on tarmac) as soothing ASMR-style audio. Detainees are filmed being walked toward a waiting plane, restraints are laid out and applied in tight close-up, and a person is shown ascending the airstairs. The ASMR framing turns an enforcement action into deliberate entertainment-style content designed to be provocative and shareable.

script.scene: Low-angle shot on a wet tarmac: an officer in a hi-vis vest guides shackled detainees in gray sweatsuits toward a parked white jetliner under a bright cloudy sky.
Close-up of feet walking past chains and handcuffs laid out across the pavement, emphasizing the metallic ASMR sounds of the restraints.
Continued close shot of multiple sets of chains and cuffs strewn on the ground as boots step through them.
Extreme close-up of handcuffs being ratcheted onto a detainee's wrist inside a vehicle/seat, foregrounding the click of the cuffs.
Upward-angle shot of a detainee in a plaid jacket climbing the metal airplane stairs against a cloudy sky, completing the boarding sequence.
